Why we exist

One partner, one standard, every building.

Founded by Julian King after a decade managing student accommodation at a KwaZulu-Natal university, SPMG exists to fix a problem he saw first-hand: fragmented contractors are what turn good housing into a bad living experience.

Read our full story →

01 / Property Management

One clear line of sight, not five reports.

We run the daily administration of a residence — occupancy records, financial reporting, compliance documentation and vendor coordination — so owners get one clear line of sight instead of disconnected reports from every contractor on site.

02 / Security Services

Built around the rhythm of student life.

Trained, visible personnel handle access control, incident response and after-hours monitoring — built around the actual rhythm of student life rather than a generic commercial site.

03 / Cleaning & Hygiene

The standard residents actually deserve.

Contract cleaning run to OHS Act standards, with scheduled deep-cleans and weekly site inspections that keep common areas and ablutions at the standard residents actually deserve.

04 / Maintenance

Caught before it becomes a complaint.

Scheduled inspection rounds catch small issues — leaks, fittings, electrical faults — before they become costly repairs or resident complaints.

05 / Training & Development

The standard holds, even off shift.

On-site staff are trained on admin procedure, safety protocol and campus-specific security procedure, so the standard holds even when key people are off shift.

06 / Letting

Not handed off to a disconnected agent.

Tenant sourcing, screening and placement, run with the same accountability as the rest of the building's operations.

4

Ongoing management

Regular reporting and inspection keep standards visible.

Common questions

Before you get in touch.

Yes — most relationships start with a single discipline, and expand once the standard is visible on-site.
Not necessarily — we can work alongside existing staff and systems, or take over specific functions fully, depending on what the property needs.
We're based in Westville and operate across the greater eThekwini metro, with a growing footprint across KwaZulu-Natal.
Owners receive regular structured reports covering occupancy, maintenance, incidents and cleaning inspections — the specific cadence is agreed during onboarding.

Home / About Us
Our story

Built to fix a problem seen first-hand.

SPMG didn't start as a business plan. It started with a decade spent inside the actual, day-to-day reality of student accommodation.

The founder

Julian King

Before founding SPMG, Julian King spent over a decade managing student accommodation at a KwaZulu-Natal university — close enough to the daily operations to see exactly where things broke down.

The pattern was consistent: security handled by one contractor, cleaning by another, maintenance requests lost somewhere in between, and no single person accountable when something went wrong.

SPMG was built as the alternative — a single, accountable operator across every discipline a student residence actually needs, run to one consistent standard.

Where the gap was clearest
How we got here

From frontline experience to founding SPMG.

01

A decade on the inside

Years spent managing student accommodation operations at a KwaZulu-Natal university — living the day-to-day realities of the sector.

02

Recognising the gap

Fragmented contractors across security, cleaning and maintenance meant no one was accountable for the resident's actual experience.

03

Founding SPMG

A 100% South African company built to bring every discipline under one accountable standard: S.A.F.E.

04

Today

Operating across the greater eThekwini metro, working with institutions and landlords who want one partner, not five.

What we're building toward

KwaZulu-Natal's most trusted name in student housing.

Recognition as the region's most trusted operator across the full student housing lifecycle — from move-in to move-out — starts with getting every building right, one at a time.

Our values in practice

See how S.A.F.E. shapes every decision.

Read our values → Get in touch
Home / Our Values
How we operate

Four commitments, spelled out: S.A.F.E.

These aren't a poster on a wall. They're the standard every SPMG site — and every person on it — is measured against.

S

Social Responsibility

Ethical practice as standard, and a genuine contribution to the communities each property sits inside.

A

Accountability

We answer for every decision that affects staff, clients and the students living in our buildings.

F

Fairness

Equitable treatment and equal opportunity, applied consistently across every stakeholder.

E

Excellence

The highest standard on every site, every shift — not just the ones being inspected.

In practice

What each principle looks like day to day.

S

Social Responsibility

We treat every site as part of the community it sits in — not a fenced-off operation passing through. That means ethical hiring, fair treatment of on-site staff, and decisions that consider the neighbourhood, not just the building.

A

Accountability

One operator means one party answers for outcomes — not a chain of subcontractors pointing at each other. Reporting is structured so owners always know exactly where things stand.

F

Fairness

The same standard applies whether it's a large residence or a small one, a long-standing client or a new one. Staff are treated with the same equity we expect them to extend to residents.

E

Excellence

Inspections happen whether or not a client is watching. The goal is a standard that holds on an ordinary Tuesday, not just before a site visit.

See it on your property

Let S.A.F.E. run your residence.
